actionCalls.description: Send an email to the person submitting the waitlist request
actionCalls.name: Send_email_to_Applicant
actionCalls.label: Send email to Applicant

choices.description: Indicates user as a business analyst certification
choices.name: chBusinessAnalyst

choices.description: Indicates the user has no certifications
choices.name: chNoCerts

choices.description: Indicates user does not want to receive phone calls from Transition Trails
choices.name: chOptOutCall

choices.description: Indicates user does not want to receive email from Transition Trails
choices.name: chOptOutEmail

choices.description: Indicates user does not want to receive texts from Transition Trails
choices.name: chOptOutTexting

choices.description: Indicates the user has other certifications not listed
choices.name: chOtherCertifications

choices.description: Indicates the user has the Salesforce Platform Foundations certification
choices.name: chSalesforceCertifiedPlatformFoundations

choices.description: Indicates the user has the Salesforce Certified Platform Administrator certification
choices.name: chSalesforcePlatformAdmin

constants.description: URL to the transitiontrails program registration website page
constants.name: cTTPrograms

decisions.description: Decide if a contact exists or not.
decisions.name: Decision_ContactExists
decisions.label: Contact Exists?

decisions.description: Only applicants who have at least one of the required certifications are a fit for this program
decisions.name: Have_Required_Certifications
decisions.label: Have Required Certifications?

decisions.description: If individual is already employed as a Salesforce admin, then they need Trail of Mastery or Explorers' Trail.
decisions.name: Right_Fit_for_Guided_Trail
decisions.label: Right Fit for Guided Trail?

decisions.description: Due to the complexities of supporting participants outside of the United states, we are excluding anyone who is not in the US
decisions.name: USResidentCheck
decisions.label: US Resident Check

Flow.description: Testing with System - w/o sharing to see if it solves LWR site visibility issues Registration process for the Guided Trail program

dynamicChoiceSets.description: List of planned or active programs
dynamicChoiceSets.name: rcsPrograms

formulas.description: Comment made from several text fields on application
formulas.name: AppComment

formulas.description: Converts Are You Employed into a check
formulas.name: Employed

formulas.description: Indicates applicant is in United States; answer converted to boolean
formulas.name: InUS

Flow.label: Program Registration - Guided Trail

recordCreates.description: Create a Contact with program information so that the person can be vetted prior to being waitlisted into a program
recordCreates.name: Create_Contact
recordCreates.label: Create Contact

recordLookups.description: Looks up the Contact object to see if there’s already a record in Salesforce with the same email that the registrant entered on the signup screen.
recordLookups.name: Get_Existing_Contact
recordLookups.label: Contact Check

screens.description: Initial screen seen by user where user will enter required information
screens.name: Initial_Screen
screens.label: Initial Screen

fields.name: CurrentlyInUS
fields.fieldText: Are you currently located in the United States?

fields.name: Are_you_currently_employed
fields.fieldText: Are you currently employed and using Salesforce?

fields.name: What_do_you_want_to_get_out_of_this_program
fields.fieldText: What do you want to get out of this program?

fields.name: AvailabilityMsg
fields.fieldText: This program includes coaching sessions and group meetings. What is your general availability so we can place you in the best group for your schedule. (note: if your timezone is not listed, just choose 'other')

fields.name: Comments
fields.fieldText: Anything else we need to know?

fields.name: ConsentMsg
fields.fieldText: Please indicate any communication channel you do not want Transition Trails to use.

screens.description: Screen to discuss waitlisting for trail of mastery.
screens.name: NoCertificationScreen
screens.label: No Certification Screen

fields.name: Copy_1_of_TrailOfMasteryMsg
fields.fieldText:
The Guided Trail program is designed for individuals who hold one or more Salesforce certifications but have not yet worked in a role that uses the platform. Since you currently do not hold any of the required certifications for this program we cannot accept your application at this time.


Please re-apply after you have acquired at least one of the certifications below:

  • Salesforce Certified Platform Foundations
  • Salesforce Certified Business Analyst
  • Salesforce Certified Platform Administrator

To keep in the loop, please subscribe to our newsletter.

screens.description: When applicant is not in the US, we need provide reason for not accepting application
screens.name: NotInUSScreen
screens.label: Not In US Screen

fields.name: Copy_1_of_NotTZMsg
fields.fieldText:
Currently, we can only accept applicants located in the US.


If you would like to be informed when our program is expanded to other countries, please subscribe to our newsletter. We publish information monthly, including upcoming events (webinars, workshops).


Thank you.

Transition Trails Programs Team

fields.name: ThankyouDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Thank you for your interest in the Guided Trail program.

We will reach out to you shortly.


Subscribe to our newsletter for additional information.

screens.description: Screen to discuss waitlisting for trail of mastery.
screens.name: TrailOfMasteryScreen
screens.label: TrailOfMasteryScreen

fields.name: TrailOfMasteryMsg
fields.fieldText:
The Guided Trail program is designed for individuals who hold one or more Salesforce certifications but have not yet worked in a role that uses the platform. Since you are currently working with Salesforce, this program would not be the best fit for you.


Instead, we invite you to explore our Trail of Mastery program, which offers a range of advanced mastery trails you may find valuable.


Please click the link below to learn more about our currently active master paths.


To keep in the loop please subscribe to our newsletter.

variables.description: Unique identifier for the lead record created. This information is used to relate the thank you email being sent to the new records
variables.name: LeadId

variables.description: Unique identifier for the program selected
variables.name: ProgramId
